use_cases: Displaying portfolio projects in a vertically scrolling showcase
Presenting feature highlights with sticky card animations
Creating storytelling experiences through sequential card reveals
Showcasing products or services with background imagery and text overlays
Building engaging landing page sections with scroll-triggered content
ai_summary: A vertically scrolling card system that uses CSS sticky positioning to create a parallax-like reveal effect. Each card displays a title, description, and background image with customizable colors passed via props. The component uses a composite structure with a Card component and CardsParallax wrapper, making it ideal for portfolio showcases, project presentations, or storytelling sections. Features responsive design with mobile and desktop breakpoints.
